name: Blank Manng of Chicken
recipeIngredient: The almond milk (simmer 2 lb almonds in 2 cups water and 1 tsp sugar until all the flavor is extracted, about 12 hours. Strain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the almond milk by simmering the almonds gently in the water and sugar for about 12 hours, then strain.
2. Place the chicken in a large saucepan, cover with boiling water, add onion, bouquet garni, and seasoning. Cover and bring to a boil.
3. Simmer until the bird is tender (about 1 1/2 - 2 hours), depending on size. Remove from stock, discard skin and bones, cut into bite-sized pieces, and keep warm.
4. Cook rice in the almond milk using some chicken stock to achieve desired liquid level. Drain but do not dry; it should be moist.
5. Return rice to saucepan and add diced chicken, butter, sugar, ground almonds. Season well.
6. Fry whole almonds lightly in oil or fat until golden. Sprinkle with a little salt.
7. Serve rice on heated dish, decorated with fried almonds and parsley.
